calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, J. Willis-McGhee
CSR: B. Fields #7235
Petitioner Xuefen Zhao mother was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Baoyi Wu.
Cantonese - Interpreter: Ting Kam Chak Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father was not present, but consented to the name change of the minor.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Shelly Wu
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
